description: Style NoteJust the pair for a weekend by the pool - this pair of sandals for men from franco leone are a closet essential. Hate your claustrophobic formal shoes after a long day at work? Switch to this pair as soon as you're home. These look good with shorts, PJs or casual pants - need more reasons to snag this pair?. Product DetailsWide brown criss-crossing straps that cover the forefoot and midfoot regionHas a soft footbed with print at the heel, has a Velcro back strapHas a TPU outsole, upraised at the heel, has oval grooves and nubsMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
